sections: HCM-1.4 — Profile-aware setup and doctor decisions
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup and doctor decision proof gate
reviewed dependency, implementation, and proof evidence

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 3 of the exact eleven-file twice-remediated HCM-1.4 planning subject. Reviews 1 and 2 returned six and four Required findings. The parent remediated both complete rounds in docs only; both immutable dispatches and all proof/remediation walls are manifested. Review 2 confirmed prior R001/R002/R003/R005/R006 remedies and found remaining API/regression gaps now addressed by two test-helper-only author fixture exceptions, a total setup request/root/error/wire contract, and a total inspection status/reason table. Independently validate every byte and derive a new complete verdict; inherit no prior conclusion.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted eleven-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, current SPEC/plan/unchecked todo, all three proof/remediation walls, and both predecessor immutable dispatches.

Read unchanged control-pack authority, landed HCM-1.1/HCM-1.2/HCM-1.3 source/tests/records, live setup/doctor/route-state/author/CLI/profile/condition/registry code, Cargo manifests, package proof, CI, and official dependency docs only as needed.

Run read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, API compile-feasibility, setup error-table, inspection status/reason, exact allowlist, TDD-ordering, author-regression, package/source-tree, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, and security checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.

No Rust, Cargo, runtime/product, production authoring, reset repair, condition evidence/evaluator, compiler publication, CI, canonical content, HCM-2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, adapter, contract, or dock implementation.

Do not infer an unspecified evidence producer, API field/type, error precedence, inspection pair, compatibility bridge, reset transaction, publication change, platform proof, final HCM-4 DTO, content authority, or later-slice behavior.
Do not treat either parent remediation or predecessor review as approval.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact eleven-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated gate, concrete failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.

Re-verify every Review 1 remedy: current status/selector, condition-definition-only unknown narrowing with no evidence API, honest unchanged reset, exact engine/compiler API seam, compiler source-tree substitute, and actual Windows runtime stop gate.

Re-verify Review 2 author-test remedy: live helpers truly depend on setup; only the two test files/helper imports are allowlisted; the exact retained legacy fixture construction is feasible; production authoring and all substantive 47/22 assertions remain unchanged and green; fixed-symbol scans admit only those hunks.

Re-verify Review 2 setup-contract remedies: SetupMode Serialize values compile; every mode/root/flag/rewrite/profile/reset input and I/O failure has one exact precedence, root action, error kind/reason/path, mutation rule, CLI status, and exit mapping with no missing public case.

Re-verify Review 2 inspection remedy: every low-level missing/success/YAML/duplicate/non-object/schema/document/aggregate/symlink/non-regular/path/platform/read result has one exact applicability-aware status/reason pair and named test, including present-invalid conditional and post-aggregate behavior.

Review the complete engine decision/inspection and compiler setup/doctor API shown in code blocks for trait/type/ownership/visibility/error/serialization feasibility against live APIs; report any implementation-time decision still left open.

Verify setup/doctor use one injected closure, default shipped resolver is explicit, fixed decision path is absent only for those seams, structural inspection does not steal HCM-2, setup writes no artifact, rewrite/refusal/mutation rules are total, and CLI owns wording/JSON/exit.

Verify exact existing/new file allowlists cover every named code/test/proof/primary/closeout task, TDD is genuinely RED-before-production, and all focused/sibling/workspace/package/source-tree/Windows/security/determinism/scope gates are feasible.
Verify control-pack classification ceiling, todo unchecked, docs-only current mutations, honest review lineage, exact final review/two-commit choreography, and no HCM-2 activation.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than inventing evidence authority, API fields, request/error precedence, inspection pairs, authoring behavior, compatibility, reset transaction, publication, platform proof, content authority, or later-slice decisions.
Return to the parent if remediation would require Rust/runtime work, broader control-pack authority, HCM-2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
